backlog_trend_metrics.verdict: GREEN — all backlog tiers (info/moderate/major/operator_escalation) below thresholds. Net velocity +150/7d (healthy drain).

findings.title: DIRECTIVE-20260517-002 completed: PROP-044 authored
findings.detail: High-priority operator directive requested PROP authoring for the analyst cross-run claim mechanism (duplicate-Mode-1-concurrency bug). PROP-044 selects option B (FUSE-canonical active-claim.json) over options A (min-spacing) / C (per-tracker-entry claim) / D (per-run-file directory). Rationale: option A is wrong-sized for the operator's 30m-cadence target; option C adds a third concurrent writer to the already-fragile expansion-tracker.json; option D is over-engineered for ≤2-concurrent-Opus-runs scale. Option B is a single-writer FUSE-only file with 90-minute TTL — symmetric in spirit with analyst-baby's claim discipline but isolated to its own surface.
findings.operator_action_required: review PROP-044, apply patches P1-P9 via operator + cowork-claude
